problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
